meta.title: Spencermartinsiella ligniputridi sp. nov., a yeast species isolated from rotten wood
meta.journalTitle:
International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary
 Microbiology

abstractHtml: Four strains of a novel heterothallic yeast species were isolated from rotten wood samples collected at different locations in Hungary. Analysis of sequences of the D1/D2 domain of the large subunit rRNA gene placed the novel species in the genus Spencermartinsiella. The novel species can be distinguished from Spencermartinsiella europaea, the single species of the genus, and from Candida cellulosicola, the only recognized anamorphic species of the Spencermartinsiella clade, on the basis of standard phenotypic characteristics. The relatedness among the four strains of the novel species and two closely related strains representing undescribed yeast species is discussed. The name Spencermartinsiella ligniputridi sp. nov. is proposed to accommodate the four novel strains. The type and isotype strains of Spencermartinsiella ligniputridi sp. nov. are NCAIM Y.01992T ( = CBS 12585T = NRRL Y-48818T) and NCAIM Y.01936I ( = CBS 12586I = NRRL Y-48819I), respectively. Two additional strains are NCAIM Y.01991 and NCAIM Y.01993.
bodyHtml:
• The GenBank/EMBL/DDBJ accession numbers for the D1/D2 domain nuclear large subunit rRNA gene sequences of strains NCAIM Y.01992T, NCAIM Y 01936I, GY44S02 and GA1S04 are JF895511, GQ340912, JQ683770 and JQ683771, respectively. The GenBank/EMBL/DDBJ accession numbers for the ITS1, 5.8S rRNA gene and ITS2 regions of strains NCAIM Y.01992T, NCAIM Y 01936I, NCAIM Y.01991, GY44S02 and GA1S04 are JF909555, JF909554, JF909556, JQ683772 and JQ683773, respectively. The GenBank/EMBL/DDBJ accession numbers for the mitochondrial small-subunit rRNA gene sequences of strains NCAIM Y 01936I, NCAIM Y.01991, GY44S02 and GA1S04 are JQ683766, JQ683767, JQ683768 and JQ683769, respectively.

  • The MycoBank no. is MB 564539.

  • One supplementary table is available with the online version of this paper.

Abbreviations:
D1/D2 LSU
D1/D2 domains of the large subunit
mtSSU
mitochondrial small-subunit
